subject: [PATCH v3 3/4] cleanup: Annotate guard constructors with __nonnull()

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: Made several minor changes to the patch, including rewording a paragraph and removing unnecessary text.

reviews.author: Miguel Ojeda
reviews.summary: Approved the patch and added an Acked-by, but did not provide any substantive feedback.
reviews.raw_body:
On Tue, May 19, 2026 at 1:54 PM Dmitry Ilvokhin <d@ilvokhin.com> wrote:
>
> Thanks, fixed locally.

Sounds good, thanks!

Acked-by: Miguel Ojeda <ojeda@kernel.org>

Cheers,
Miguel

2026-05-19.patch_summary: The patch annotates guard constructors with __nonnull() to enforce compiler warnings for statically known NULL values.
